gold_answer: (i) Following a woman and contacting or attempting to contact her to foster personal interaction repeatedly despite a clear indication of her disinterest, or (ii) monitoring her use of the internet, e-mail, or any other form of electronic communication.

results.claim_text: A woman has indicated disinterest in personal interaction.
results.best_matching_sentence: The two types of conduct that constitute the offence of 'stalking' under BNS section 78 are: (i) following a woman and contacting, or attempting to contact such woman to foster personal interaction repeatedly despite a clear indication of disinterest by such woman, and (ii) monitoring the use by a woman of the internet, e-mail or any other form of electronic communication [Chunk-ID: c4decaec-7514-4b58-baf3-a269b0e3f484].
